chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No.S-1148 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on MA No.6964/2016 2. For hearing of main case 01-04-2019 Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the applicant. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. It appears that after filing of this application, the applicant has lost his interest; therefore, same is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
